flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at National Park College fell 24% between 2007 and 2010 (29.1% → 22.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at National Park College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at National Park College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $7.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at National Park College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (59.9% → 50.6%).
